title: T-029 — POST /api/production/work-orders/:id/by-products (co + by-products with allocation_pct)
prompt:
# T-029 — POST /work-orders/:id/by-products

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.3 FR-08-E3-002, §8.2.3, 03-TECH §7.2 (allocation_pct)

## Goal
Implement POST /by-products that registers co_product or by_product LPs sized per BOM.allocation_pct from 03-TECH §7.2.

## Implementation contract
App Router POST /api/production/work-orders/[id]/by-products accepting one body per call: {transaction_id: uuid, operator_id: uuid, output_type: 'co_product'|'by_product', item_id: uuid, qty_kg: number(>0)}. withIdempotency. Validate item_id is in BOM.bom_co_products for this WO. Validate qty_kg roughly matches BOM.allocation_pct × primary_output_qty within 10% (warn-only). Otherwise reuses register-output service. Return 200 {output_id, lp_id, batch_number, allocation_match: boolean, expected_pct, actual_pct}.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/by-products/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/work-orders/[id]/by-products/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/register-byproduct.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given by_product item_id in BOM.bom_co_products with allocation_pct=0.05, when POST with qty matching 5% of primary, then 200 + allocation_match=true
2. Given item_id NOT in BOM.bom_co_products for this WO, when POST, then 409 with error code 'item_not_in_bom_byproducts'
3. Given qty deviates >10% from expected allocation, when POST, then 200 with allocation_match=false (warn) and actual_pct populated — does not block

## Test strategy
- RED: route test asserting allocation match + 409 + warn path before route exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test work-orders.*by-products'

## Risk red lines
- Do not strictly block on allocation mismatch (warn only — yield gate handles strict in T-035)
- Do not allow registering items outside bom_co_products
- Do not skip RLS

pipeline_inputs.description: POST /by-products: validates item against bom_co_products, computes allocation match.
pipeline_inputs.details: Per call registers one co/by-product LP. Allocation_pct read from BOM.bom_co_products (03-TECH §7.2). Mismatch >10% logged as warn (allocation_match=false) but does not block. Reuses register-output service for LP creation + wo_outputs insert.
out_of_scope: Do not implement primary output here (T-028)
Do not implement output yield gate (T-035)
acceptance_criteria: Given by_product allocation_pct=0.05, when POST qty=5% of primary, then 200 + allocation_match=true
Given item not in bom_co_products, when POST, then 409 item_not_in_bom_byproducts
Given >10% deviation, when POST, then 200 + allocation_match=false (warn, no block)
test_strategy: RED: route test asserting allocation match + 409 + warn before route exists
risk_red_lines: Do not block on allocation mismatch
